title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF NEW AGUTAYA, MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3327 / 51 OG No. 6, 2804 (June, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1238, June 07, 1955 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF NEW AGUTAYA, MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Nasalogan in the Municipality of Taytay, Province of Palawan, is constituted into a barrio of the said municipality, to be known as the barrio of New Agutaya.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 7, 1955.
